raw.message: Join PS Plus Extra from $14.99 per month

hook.summary: Fast-paced brand intro transitioning from the PlayStation logo to game footage cards.
hook.visual_action: The PlayStation logo fades into a series of sliding blue cards showcasing game characters.
hook.text_overlay: PlayStation Plus, MORE TO PLAY MORE TO LOVE
hook.voiceover_transcript: Put 'em up to the sky, put 'em up, put 'em up

scene_flow: Iconic PlayStation logo animation on a blue background.
Dynamic blue cards slide across the screen, revealing game footage of Aloy from Horizon.
The slogan 'MORE TO PLAY MORE TO LOVE' animates into the center of the frame.
Final screen displays the call to action 'JOIN FOR MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE' with the service logo.
on_screen_text: MORE TO PLAY MORE TO LOVE
JOIN FOR MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE
Content and subscription features vary by tier, over time and region / country. Age restrictions & terms apply.
cta_text: JOIN FOR MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE
audience_proxy: Core console gamers and PlayStation fans looking for a library of high-quality titles.
